creator: fk@fabiankeil.de
text:
Thanks for the clarification, I'll use the MFH flag in the future.

My personal preference would be to always MFH www/youtube_dl updates
as they tend to contain fixes that are required for the script to continue to
work with certain sites.

The ChangeLog (which I should have referenced in the initial description)
contains a bunch of "Fix extraction" entries between 2017.05.29 and
2017.07.30.1:
https://github.com/rg3/youtube-dl/blob/master/ChangeLog
